text:
Intro paragraph.
Multi-link cell, Links = See [Page A](https://example.com/a) and [Page B](https://example.com/b) for details.. Plain cell, Links = Just text. Formatted cell, Links = **Bold** and *italic* text. Inline code cell, Links = `inline_fn()`. Block code cell, Links = ```
do_thing()
```. Pre with link, Links = `See` [`the docs`](https://example.com/docs) `first`
Outro paragraph.
